rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE STEVE CAMPODONICO REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing subject to the following change to the order: item #1.d. struck. While this court issues orders that specific assets are in a trust, it does not issue orders that all other assets are in the trust without identifying those assets. Please note, since the trust did not contain a Schedule A, Heggstad is not the best authority to cite. Kucker v. Kucker, re a general assignment is better authority.
